changelog: Overlay script is now injected at request time via middleware, so it also works when the web directory is read-only (Linux packages, Docker). No more writing to index.html.
description: Standardizes age ratings to the German FSK format (FSK-0/6/12/16/18) and fills in missing or foreign ratings using official German certifications from TMDb.
name: FSK Rating Updater
overview: German FSK age ratings for the whole library.
